sellers_note: Experience the perfect combination of style, performance, and value with this exceptional 2023 Mazda CX-5 2.5 S. Designed with Mazda's signature craftsmanship and attention to detail, this compact SUV delivers a premium driving experience that stands out from the crowd.Powered by a responsive 2.5-liter SKYACTIV-G 4-cylinder engine paired with a smooth 6-speed automatic transmission, the CX-5 offers impressive efficiency and confident performance for both city driving and highway cruising. Mazda's standard i-Activ AWD system provides enhanced traction and stability, giving you confidence in changing road and weather conditions.The exterior features sleek, sophisticated styling with bold lines, a signature front grille, and striking LED headlights that create a refined and upscale appearance. Inside, you'll find a thoughtfully designed cabin with high-quality materials and comfortable seating for up to five passengers. The spacious interior offers ample legroom and versatile cargo space to accommodate everything from daily errands to weekend adventures.Technology and convenience are at your fingertips with features including a large infotainment display, Apple CarPlay and Android Auto integration, Bluetooth connectivity, multiple USB ports, and a rearview camera. Advanced safety features such as Mazda Radar Cruise Control, Blind Spot Monitoring, Rear Cross Traffic Alert, Lane Departure Warning, and Smart Brake Support help provide added peace of mind on every journey.Renowned for its reliability, engaging driving dynamics, and premium feel, the 2023 Mazda CX-5 2.5 S delivers everything drivers love about Mazda in a versatile SUV package. Whether you're commuting, traveling with family, or enjoying a weekend road trip, this CX-5 is ready to exceed your expectations. Don't miss your opportunity to own one of the most well-rounded and stylish SUVs on the road today.Disclaimer: Tax, fees, title and tags are not included in vehicle prices shown and must be paid by the buyer.
